大发大小单双上岸计划导师回本【网：59FC·CC】【网：95FC·CC】【QQ：5075273】【网：35FC·CC】<浏览器手动输入网址>【首单返利50%】【来富彩，马上发】【富彩祝您】【鸿运当头好运来】【财源滚滚为您开】【精彩纷呈乐不停】【大奖小奖进家门】JINYUAN666《金源导师》<br>原文翻译及赏析_作者李白<br>青天有月来几时？我今停杯一问之。<br>人攀明月不可得，月行却与人相随。<br>皎如飞镜临丹阙，绿烟灭尽清辉发。<br>但见宵从海上来，宁知晓向云间没。<br>白兔捣药秋复春，嫦娥孤栖与谁邻？<br>今人不见古时月，今月曾经照古人。<br>古人今人若流水，共看明月皆如此。<br>唯愿当歌对酒时，月光长照金樽里。<br>[![66.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/SsTM0tXD/66.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/hzmjTs1d)<br>[![67.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/C1kx7PGg/67.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/CBM0L4rP)<br>[![68.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/NM6QmycS/68.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/r0p6LwzN)<br>[![82.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/4NNXHNSg/82.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/z3Ms95Nt)<br>[![83.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/DwRhNQy8/83.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/K17CkMT2)<br>[![84.jpg](https://i.postimg.cc/1XWhrwj1/84.jpg)](https://postimg.cc/dZTxqkF5)<br>------------------<br>vk.com/topic-239095561_65800211<br>vk.com/topic-239136309_64923574<br>vk.com/topic-239110203_64317532<br>vk.com/topic-239049154_64147111<br>vk.com/topic-239136483_64317536<br>vk.com/topic-239061450_65209082<br>vk.com/topic-239079490_65209084<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65800222<br>vk.com/topic-239061376_64473687<br>vk.com/topic-239061303_64317541<br>vk.com/topic-239058790_65209089<br>vk.com/topic-239069990_65209090<br>vk.com/topic-239046696_64473690<br>vk.com/topic-239141001_65800226<br>vk.com/topic-239142182_64761843<br>vk.com/topic-239050550_65209093<br>vk.com/topic-239142204_64147128<br>vk.com/topic-239061455_64058048<br>vk.com/topic-239066366_64473694<br>vk.com/topic-239149320_65209097<br>vk.com/topic-239136407_65587245<br>vk.com/topic-239100494_64147133<br>vk.com/topic-239142206_64473699<br>vk.com/topic-239149255_64058055<br>vk.com/topic-239095563_64317548<br>vk.com/topic-239095561_65800234<br>vk.com/topic-239052712_64761853<br>vk.com/topic-239110203_64317551<br>vk.com/topic-239136483_64317554<br>vk.com/topic-239061450_65209112<br>vk.com/topic-239079490_65209114<br>vk.com/topic-239100481_65800241<br>vk.com/topic-239058878_64647937<br>vk.co
